title.en: Ye Tian put it away and continued to choose sup...

content.en:
Ye Tian took the book given by the merchant, this classic book is not a reward, it can only be regarded as something given by the merchant, and the value is actually not high.

Ye Tian put it away and continued to choose supernatural powers.

The Chaos Divine Power has been chosen, but the two Great Divine Powers have not yet been chosen.

Looking at these great supernatural powers, Ye Tian was secretly thinking.

"I have a Origin Thing-Immortal Divine Gold, which is also extremely high at the level of Innate Origin Things, and I must choose a top-notch Great Divine Power corresponding to the Immortal Divine Gold, so that I can confidently practice another top-notch Great Divine Power, and my strength will skyrocket!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he chose a top-notch supernatural power.

"I choose the Great Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tiandao.

"The Great Immortal Technique, yes, this top-notch Great Divine Power is ranked 26th among the Three Thousand Great Divine Powers, and it is definitely an incomparably powerful Great Divine Power, once it is practiced, it is enough to be proud of its peers. "

Shang nodded.

"The second top-notch supernatural power, I choose the Great Destruction Technique, and the Innate Origin chooses to destroy the dark gold. "

Ye Tian said.

The constant light supernatural power he now possessed was the Escape Technique, the Speed Divine Power, and the Great Immortal Skill was the life-saving supernatural power, so he lacked a terrifying top-notch Great Divine Power.

So, he chose the Great Destruction Technique.

After all, there are not many great supernatural powers in the top 100, and the top one is the Great Destruction Technique.

After choosing one chaotic supernatural power, two great supernatural powers, and one origin thing, Shang took out all the supernatural power inheritance and destruction dark gold and handed them to Ye Tian.

At this point, the reward is over.

"Ye Tian, you are now an official disciple of the reserves, and your salary is actually not much higher than that of a registered disciple. The temple won't do you much good, and it's up to you. Remember, you must raise your strength to the three-star god general level before the Heavenly Mandate realm, then you can become a formal disciple of that great being. And you must not increase your combat power by consuming your potential, otherwise your official disciple status will still be canceled. Shang reminded.

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian bent down and said.

Suddenly.

Shang took out another pair of scrolls, which were the scrolls of the third round of assessment.

"This is the Void Heaven Diagram, you can take it with you, if you can comprehend it thoroughly, and if you can comprehend it before the Heavenly Mandate Realm, you will directly become the personal disciple of that great existence. Shang said.

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He knew how difficult it was to become a full-fledged disciple, although he was already a full-fledged disciple of the reserves, he still had to raise his strength to a three-star god general before he could become a full-fledged disciple.

But as long as you comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, you don't need any conditions, and you can directly become a disciple!

What is a personal disciple is above the official disciple.

"You must comprehend the Void Heaven Map!"

Ye Tian secretly made up his mind.

But he also knew very well that it had to be very difficult.

"Go ahead!"

Shang Yi waved his hand and sent Ye Tian away.

......

Outside the Temple.

Ye Tian appeared here, and as soon as he appeared, he saw Niu Ryu with a smile on his face.

"Your Highness, you're out!"

Niu Ryu said very politely.

"Your Highness?"

Regarding the name of Niu Rong, Ye Tian felt a little strange.

"His Royal Highness is the title of the official disciple of the reserve, in fact, the title of the official disciple, but with the talent of His Highness, he can become an official disciple sooner or later, so I am called so!"

"I see!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Senior Niu Ryu, I have passed the assessment, and now I am ready to leave!"

Ye Tian said.

"Don't!" Niu Ryu hurriedly said: "Your Highness, you don't need to leave in a hurry, although the inheritance of the temple is good, it is impossible for the temple to give you resources, everything needs to rely on yourself." But the Chaos God Realm is different, the Chaos God Realm is not an ordinary world, some of the treasures here are excellent cultivation places for His Highness, and some of the treasures here can even improve His Highness's strength!"

"What do I have to give?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Your Highness doesn't need to pay anything, if Your Highness is just an ordinary registered disciple, we can't give you benefits, but Your Highness is now a reserve official disciple, once you become an official disciple, the Chaos God Realm will leave the universe and return to the outside world, and we can also leave!" Niu Ryu said truthfully.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized, no wonder Niu Ryu's attitude had changed so much.

"What are the good places in the Chaos God Realm, take me there!"

Ye Tiandao.

Chaotic God Realm, chaotic sea.

This place is located in the deeper part of the Chaotic God Realm, and there are palaces in the Chaotic Sea, where some ancient beings of the Oxen Clan cultivate.

Not long after, Ye Tian and Niu Ryu came over.

"Your Highness, this is the Sea of Troubled Waves, one of the cultivation treasures of the Chaos God Realm, the water here can temper the body, but only the effect is good at the beginning, and the effect is getting worse and worse later, and even in the end, it can only be refined as ordinary energy!" Niu Ryu explained.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, he entered one of the palaces under the arrangement of Ushiru.

This palace is half on the water and half underwater, and the cultivation room also has the water of the turbulent sea, so that you can soak in the water and temper your body.

Palace cultivation secret room.

Ye Tian didn't start cultivating as soon as possible, but took out the harvest this time.

"Xuan Xuan Jue!"

Ye Tian began to flip through the Xuanxuan Formula, and countless mysteries were manifested, allowing him to continue to understand the mysteries of the Xuanxuan Formula.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's eyes showed excitement: "It is worthy of the real Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique, the Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique ignores the limit, as long as the talent is enough and the potential is enough, you can continue to cultivate, keep refining your body, and strengthen yourself." Compared with the Xuan Xuan Jue, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, a simplified version of the Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique, is much, much worse. The Xuan Xuan Jue is divided into three chapters, the Earth Venerable Chapter, the Heavenly Mandate Chapter and the True Spirit Chapter, and the one in my hand is the Earth Venerable Chapter. And the Earth Venerable Chapter has a total of six layers, and once it reaches the second layer, it is enough to be comparable to the eighth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique. "

Originally, it was difficult for his physical body to continue to be refined, but after obtaining the Xuanxuan Technique, he could continue to improve.

Of course, the Xuanxu Technique is not easy to cultivate, and if he doesn't have the resources, it will be difficult for him to get started.

"The water of the chaotic sea is enough to assist in the cultivation of the Xuan Xuan Jue, I hope it can help me step into the third layer of the Xuan Xuan Jue, once I practice, my strength will skyrocket!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian soaked in the turbulent sea water and comprehended the secret of Xuanxuan.

Time passed slowly like this-
